Alguna idea???

### Post by Rob_Erto on 2010-05-26

### Post by r_s on 2010-05-26
after you manually add your ip , and configure the net using the Network Manager, then this file would contain information about the network you have just set up. Post that output, (after you have setup your connection), the contents of this file are temporary , and it's contents are rewritten whenever you use the Network Manager to configure a network connection.
